title: Light The Way
description: A well made flashlight mod, that has smooth real-time lighting with veil.
body: # Light The Way A simple flashlight mod that uses veil to make smooth, dynamic flashlights. It also works in multiplayer! ![Flashlight on a mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rmFj5yks/images/9e7df6aba0fe1900650f029426f21c481a9d3455.png) ![Crafting recipe for flashlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20c869d00b4882e554a3fda84bbdd10b10d692cf.png) Model for flashlight is by [frenderman](https://x.com/Frenderman2)!
